zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia de Bold於1225年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯可特時，她的父親Matthew de Bold35歲，母親Agnes25歲。她於1242年與Gilbert de Haydock I在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1312年12月在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波爾德享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia de Bold于1225年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯可特时，她的父亲Matthew de Bold35岁，母亲Agnes25岁。她于1242年与Gilbert de Haydock I在英国英格兰藍卡爾波爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1312年12月在英国英格兰藍卡爾波爾德享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): from Middle English bold ‘dwelling-house’ (Old English bold the West Midland and northwestern form of Old English bōthl, bōtl), especially in the sense ‘castle or manor house’ for someone who lived or worked at the main house, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, for example Bold (Lancashire), The Bold in Aston Botterell (Shropshire), Booden Farm in Haughton, Booth in Blithfield, and Bull Bridge in Penkridge (all Staffordshire). Compare Bodle .
English: nickname from Middle English bold, Old English b(e)ald ‘bold, brave, noble’, which in Middle English developed the additional sense ‘arrogant, impudent, shameless’.
English: variant of   Bolt   and possibly a variant of   Bald   2.

variants.name: Bollmann
meanings: German:
elaborated derivative of the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo (see Bold 4).

topographic name for a man who lived on a rounded hill, from Middle Low German bol ‘rounded hill’ + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from any of several places called Boll (see Boll ). Compare Bolman .

variants.name: Bowlds
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Bold  .

variants.name: Boldman
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German Boldemann: from a compound of a variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo (see Bold 4) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Bodle
meanings: English: habitational name from Buddle Oak in Halse (Somerset), Buddle in Fordingbridge (Hampshire), Buddle in Niton (Isle of Wight), Budleigh in Moretonhampstead (Devon), or Budle in Bamburgh (Northumberland), all named from Middle English bothel, Old English bothl ‘dwelling, house’, probably denoting a homestead of some considerable size. See also Bold .
English (West Midlands): variant of   Beadle  .

variants.name: Bolds
meanings: English: variant of Bold , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Boldt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hermann, Kurt, Bernhard, Dieter, Egon, Gerd, Gerhard, Gunter, Gunther, Heinz, Hilde.
German and Danish: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, a short form of various compound names with the first element bald ‘bold’. See also German Bold , compare Bolt .

variants.name: Bolda
meanings: Polish: from the German personal name Bold (see Bold 4).
Hungarian: from a pet form of the personal name Boldizsár, Hungarian form of Baltazar .

variants.name: Bolt
meanings: English: from Middle English bolt ‘bolt, bar’, also ‘bundle’ (Old English bolt ‘arrow’). One of the most common senses of this word was ‘the blunt-headed bolt of a crossbow’, so it could have been given to an archer or to a maker of iron bars or bolts. Bolt was also used metaphorically for a short, thickset, or tubby person and for someone who was physically upright as a bolt, i.e. ‘as straight as an arrow’.
English: variant of   Bold   1.

Dutch, North German, and Danish: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, a short form of various compound names with the first element bald ‘bold’. See also German Bold , compare German and Danish Boldt .

variants.name: Bolton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern England named Bolton (Lancashire, Northumberland, Westmorland, and Yorkshire) or from Boulton in Derbyshire and East Lothian in Scotland, from Old English bothl ‘dwelling, house’ (see Bold 1) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Bolding
meanings: German: patronymic from   Bold   as a personal name.
Danish: habitational name from a place so named in Jutland.
English (Middlesex): variant of   Balding   1.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alyssa
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alissa .

variants.name: Alissa
meanings: Contracted form of   Alicia .

variants.name: Alesha
meanings: Respelling of   Alicia .

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia de Bold was born in 1225, in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Matthew de Bold, was 35 and her mother, Agnes, was 25. She married Gilbert de Haydock I in 1242, in Bold, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in December 1312, in Bold, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia de Bold est née en 1225, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Matthew de Bold, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Haydock I en 1242, à Bold, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1312, à Bold, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia de Bold 1225 in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew de Bold 35 und ihre Mutter Agnes 25. Sie hat 1242 in Bold, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Gilbert de Haydock I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1312 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Bold, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Bold è nata il nel 1225 nel Prescot, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Matthew de Bold, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert de Haydock I nel 1242, nel Bold, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1312, nel Bold, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia de Boldが1225年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトで生まれた時，父Matthew de Boldは35歳，母Agnesは25歳であった。1242年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアボルドでGilbert de Haydock Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1312年12月にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアボルドで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia de Bold(이)가 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew de Bold(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼드에서 Gilbert de Haydock I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Bold nasceu em 1225, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Matthew de Bold, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 25 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia de Bold родилась в 1225 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Matthew de Bold было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Haydock I в 1242 г. в местности болд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла декабрь 1312 г. в местности болд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia de Bold nació en 1225, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Matthew de Bold, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Gilbert de Haydock I en 1242, en Bold, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1312, en Bold, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
